description_long: This modern bungalow is enclosed within a rectangular walled lot, featuring a spacious driveway and a gated entrance. The main structure is composed of two interconnected volumes, one single-story and one two-story, both with flat roofs and large floor-to-ceiling windows. The front yard is landscaped with palm trees and green lawns, while the backyard includes a swimming pool, a patio with lounge chairs, and additional greenery. The exterior walls are finished in a mix of light beige and white, with glass and metal accents. The property is designed for open-plan living, with extensive glazing providing natural light and seamless indoor-outdoor transitions. The overall aesthetic is sleek and contemporary, emphasizing clean lines and functional outdoor spaces.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with two volumes, large windows, a gated driveway, and a backyard pool, all enclosed by a perimeter wall. The design features clean lines, open spaces, and contemporary landscaping.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the gated driveway, front lawn, and the main entrance with palm trees and the two-story section visible.
description_view_1: View 1 highlights the backyard with the swimming pool, patio, and extensive glass windows facing the outdoor living area.
description_view_2: View 2 presents the rear of the bungalow, showing the single-story section and the back entrance, with minimal landscaping.
description_view_3: View 3 displays the side elevation, emphasizing the driveway, garage, and the two-story volume with windows and palm trees.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and floor-to-ceiling glazing
